# PERF-051 positive: unsafe.Pointer used in a Gin handler
lang: go
file: PERF-051-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"unsafe"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func HandleRaw(c *gin.Context) {
	b := []byte("hello world")
	// zero-copy conversion via unsafe.Pointer
	s := *(*string)(unsafe.Pointer(&b))
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"value": s})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
